test_cases.title: Verify CT-200 powers on and displays home screen
test_cases.description: Press and hold the power button for one second, verify the device powers on and displays the home screen
test_cases.expected_result: The device powers on and displays the home screen with the correct user profile selection

test_cases.title: Verify cuﬀ inﬂation sequence and measurement accuracy
test_cases.description: Start a measurement, verify the cuﬀ inﬂates to an initial target of 180 mmHg, and then inﬂates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg, verify the measurement accuracy is within ±3 mmHg
test_cases.expected_result: The cuﬀ inﬂates correctly and the measurement accuracy is within ±3 mmHg

test_cases.title: Verify device auto-shutoff and low-battery detection
test_cases.description: Leave the device idle for 60 seconds, verify it auto-shutoffs, then simulate a low-battery condition, verify the device displays a low-battery icon and aborts the measurement
test_cases.expected_result: The device auto-shutoffs after 60 seconds of inactivity and displays a low-battery icon when the battery level falls below 15%

test_cases.title: Verify error code E1: Cuﬀ not connected or leak detected
test_cases.description: Simulate a cuﬀ not connected or leak detected condition, verify the device aborts the measurement and displays error code E1
test_cases.expected_result: The device aborts the measurement and displays error code E1

test_cases.title: Verify error code E3: Overpressure condition
test_cases.description: Simulate an overpressure condition, verify the device auto-deﬂates within 2 seconds and displays error code E3
test_cases.expected_result: The device auto-deﬂates within 2 seconds and displays error code E3

test_cases.title: Verify data storage and syncing with the CardioTrack companion app
test_cases.description: Take multiple measurements, verify the device stores the readings in non-volatile memory, then pair the device with the CardioTrack companion app, verify the readings sync automatically
test_cases.expected_result: The device stores the readings in non-volatile memory and syncs the readings with the CardioTrack companion app
